collections.title: Dark Sorceress Collection
collections.description: A striking series of 15 dark fantasy illustrations featuring powerful sorceresses, witches, and shadowy enchantresses surrounded by thorns, moons, ravens, skulls, and arcane energy in a hauntingly atmospheric black aesthetic.

images.title: Witch of the Thorn Circle
images.description: A dark witch in a pointed hat channels swirling purple energy from both hands, standing within a glowing green thorn circle beneath a crescent moon, flanked by dead trees and hanging chains.

images.description: A monstrous dark queen with writhing tentacle hair, glowing red eyes and a sinister grin rises against a crimson and purple backdrop, flanked by crimson moons, bats, and grasping clawed hands.

images.description: A pale sorceress with glowing red star-marked eyes and flowing black hair raises her clawed hands against a background of twisted trees and a crescent moon with a sleeping face.

images.description: A menacing witch in a tall decorated hat with glowing red eyes spreads her claw-like hands before a glowing full moon, surrounded by bats, crescent moons, stars, and bare skeletal trees.

images.title: Paper-Cut Witch with Staff
images.description: A paper-cut style dark witch wielding a gnarled staff and glowing red eyes stands before a crimson circle, surrounded by layered black cutout symbols including pentacles, moons, and arcane glyphs.

images.description: A graceful dark enchantress with ornate feathered crown and swirling fairy-like wings drifts among skulls and bats, her long clawed hand reaching downward in an eerie black-and-white composition.

images.title: Sorceress of the Swirling Night
images.description: A hauntingly beautiful sorceress with cracked face markings and wild flowing hair stands amid layered swirling dark energy, bats, and bare branches under a crescent moon in a paper-cut style.

images.title: Witch Beneath the Crimson-Sparked Moon
images.description: A witch in a wide-brimmed hat raises her hands in a dark forest, red glowing sparks and floating eyes surrounding her as a massive full moon illuminates bats and twisted branches overhead.

images.title: Witch of the Evil Moons
images.description: A pale witch with glowing red eyes in a tall hat walks amid swirling thorned vines, skeleton hands, snarling crescent moon faces, and red-eyed bats in a dramatic paper-cut dark fantasy style.

images.title: Rune Sorceress and the Ravens
images.description: A ghostly sorceress with wild white hair and skeleton hands channels swirling energy within a rune-inscribed circle, surrounded by four red-eyed ravens and coiling thorned vines.

images.title: Shadow Queen of Wolves and Bats
images.description: A dark silhouetted queen with glowing eyes commands wolves, bats, and grasping shadow hands within a richly layered deep crimson and purple night scene framed by swirling ornamental borders.

images.title: Dark Queen of Skulls and Roses
images.description: A dramatic dark queen with antler-like raised arms, star eye markings, and an elaborate feathered gown stands amid skulls, dark roses, and bats under a sinister grinning moon.

images.title: Witch of the Skull Vines
images.description: A witch with a bent hat and flowing hair conjures floating skulls from swirling thorned vines with both hands, surrounded by bats and spiraling dark tendrils in a black-and-white illustration.

images.title: White-Haired Sorceress and Shadow Entities
images.description: A striking sorceress with flowing white hair and a jagged feathered gown channels faint energy from both hands, surrounded by lurking shadow creatures with glowing eyes in a dark swirling background.

images.title: Witch of the Watching Forest
images.description: A solitary witch in a buckled hat carries a spiraling staff through a dark forest, her long hair swept by wind while glowing brown eyes peer from the branches and shadows around her.

images.title: Proceed With Caution Screaming Skull Crouching Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A crouching skeleton in tattered dark clothes holds its cracked skull head with both bony hands while screaming with glowing red eyes, sitting low in a defensive rage pose. Dripping scarlet text reads 'Proceed With Caution'. For those who want to send a message before anyone even opens their phone — enter at your own risk. Best on: Samsung Galaxy S24, Redmi Note 13 Pro.

images.title: Warning Skull Red Eyes Cloak Reaching Out Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A sharp-featured skull with blazing red eyes and vampire fangs wearing a dark high-collar cloak stretches one clawed hand directly toward the viewer against a solid black background. Bold red dripping text reads 'Warning'. A minimal yet menacing wallpaper that turns your phone into a threat — stylish, dark, and unapologetically scary. Best on: iPhone 14 Pro, Google Pixel 9 Pro.

images.title: Hooded Reaper Pointing You Are Next Dark Art Wallpaper
images.description: A grinning hooded skeleton reaper in a heavy dark cloak points both bony fingers directly at the viewer with glowing red eyes and a sinister smile. White grunge text reads 'You Are Next'. The classic reaper energy — this wallpaper tells the world you play by your own rules and answer to no one. Best on: Samsung Galaxy S23, iPhone 13 Pro.

images.title: Upside Down Skull Middle Finger You Are Next Bold Wallpaper
images.description: A skeleton displayed upside down with its cracked skull at the bottom and bony hands raised — one throwing a middle finger and one open palm — wearing a dark open jacket showing the spine. Dripping red text reads 'You Are Next'. The most rebellious wallpaper in the collection — raw attitude, zero apology. Best on: iPhone 15 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra.

images.title: Beware Skull Suit Pointing Finger Red Accent Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A cracked skull wearing a dark suit with red accents points one bony finger directly at the viewer with dark red eye sockets, fanged mouth open wide, and the other hand hanging at its side. Bold red outlined text reads 'Beware'. Sharp, stylish, and intimidating — the wallpaper for someone who looks like trouble and knows it. Best on: OnePlus 12 Pro, Samsung Galaxy A35.

images.title: You Again Funny Skull Dark Humor Speech Bubble Wallpaper
images.description: A wide-eyed surprised cartoon skull in a dark hoodie raises both skeleton hands in mock shock while a shadowy skull looms ominously behind it — all under a comic speech bubble reading 'You Again?' This funny-meets-creepy wallpaper is perfect for those who use dark humor as a personality — relatable, weird, and perfect for a unique lock screen. Best on: iPhone SE, Samsung Galaxy A54.

collections.title: Dark Minimal Horror Wallpaper Collection
collections.description: A bold series of 20 dark minimalist horror wallpapers featuring glowing eyes, shadowy creatures, skeleton hands, and eerie scenes designed for AMOLED screens.

images.title: Red Dragon Eye Dark Minimal Horror Wallpaper
images.description: A single glowing red reptilian eye with a slit pupil tears through the darkness with claw marks surrounding it. Represents the feeling of being watched by something ancient and predatory — the eye that never closes, never blinks, never forgives. Best for AMOLED screens.

images.title: Shadow Demon Glowing Eyes Dark Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A dark horned shadow demon with glowing yellow eyes barely visible against a charcoal background. Symbolizes the evil that hides in plain sight — present, patient, and waiting. The less you see it, the more it sees you.

images.title: Minimal Skull Red Crack Dark Art Wallpaper
images.description: A stark white skull with angry brow markings floats above a fading skeleton body with red lightning cracks spreading beneath it against a near-black background. Represents mortality dressed in rage — restless, furious, unrelenting.

images.title: Skull Bat Wings Stay Awake Dark Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A winged skull with glowing red eyes, a crown, and thorned branches forms a dark emblem with the words 'Stay Awake' beneath it. A reminder that the moment you close your eyes, something takes over — stay sharp, stay dangerous.

images.title: Claw Hand Rising Never Wake Up Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A pale sharp-clawed hand rises from the ground with the words 'Never Wake Up' below it. The story of something buried that refuses to stay down — a warning that some things should never be disturbed.

images.title: Ghost Hand Cracking Ground Dark Forest Wallpaper
images.description: A pale elongated clawed hand breaks through cracked ground surrounded by dark shadowy trees. Tells the story of something clawing its way back from wherever it was buried — slow, inevitable, unstoppable.

images.title: Hooded Figure Stay Alone Red Eyes Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A small hooded silhouette with glowing red eyes floats on a cracked dark grey wall with the words 'Stay Alone' in red beneath it. The wallpaper for those who prefer their own darkness over anyone else's light.

images.title: Red Skeleton Hand Rising Dark Minimal Art Wallpaper
images.description: A bold red skeleton hand bursts from cracked ground against a pure black background with dark geometric shapes behind it. Raw power, unburied — the kind of energy that refuses to stay contained.

images.title: Skull Glowing Eyes Bats Moon Dark Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A dark geometric skull with glowing yellow eyes floats in front of a large moon with bats flying above and ghost wisps drifting below among dark trees. The classic halloween nightmare rendered in a clean modern style — timeless dread.

images.title: Skull Hand Red Sky Dark Forest Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A dark claw hand reaches upward toward a floating tiny red-eyed skull above a crimson horizon silhouetted against a dark pine forest. A story of an essence reaching for the darkness it belongs to — finally going home.

images.title: They Watch Stay Silent Dark Forest Hooded Wallpaper
images.description: A hooded figure with white glowing eyes stands between twisted dark trees with three lines of text — 'They Watch', 'Stay Silent', 'Don't Turn Around'. The wallpaper that makes your screen feel like a survival warning. You are never truly alone.

images.title: Dark Reaper Red Glow Cracked Ground Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A tattered dark reaper with glowing red eyes floats above cracked ground with red light burning beneath its robes and shattered pieces floating around it. Represents something that was contained for too long — now free, now furious.

images.title: Villain Face Red Claw Watching Dark Art Wallpaper
images.description: A shadowy villain face with cold grey eyes looms behind a bold red geometric claw symbol with the word 'Watching' below it. Inspired by the feeling of a final boss who has already won before the fight begins — calm, calculating, omnipresent.

images.title: Skeleton Hand Eyeball Watching You Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A glowing skeleton hand holds up a bloodshot eyeball with the words 'Watching You — Don't Unlock' beneath it on a black background with thorned spiral patterns. The wallpaper that stares back at whoever picks up your phone.

images.title: Horror Do Not Awaken Skull Breaking Wall Wallpaper
images.description: A glowing red skull creature with claws tears through a cracked wall with the words 'Horror' above and 'Do Not Awaken' below against a dark grey background. The story of something sealed away for good reason — and the price of breaking that seal.

images.title: White Skull Red Thorn Emblem Dark Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A clean white skull centered inside a dark emblem of crossed bones and red thorned branches against a near-black background. Minimal, bold, and timeless — the mark of someone who lives by their own code with no apologies.

images.title: Dark Mask Glowing Red Eyes Minimal Horror Wallpaper
images.description: A dark angular mask with jagged teeth and blazing red eyes sits centered in total darkness. Represents the face we wear when we want no one to know what we are truly thinking — pure menace behind a minimal facade.

images.title: Haunted House Red Moon Zombie Hand Dark Wallpaper
images.description: A minimal haunted house glowing with warm light sits under a large red crescent moon while a dark zombie hand claws up from the ground below with the words 'Nightmare Awakes'. The moment the night officially belongs to the dead.

images.title: Red Hooded Reaper Crescent Moon Dark Minimal Wallpaper
images.description: A bold geometric red and black hooded figure with glowing red eyes stands in a dead forest under a white crescent moon. The reaper who does not run, does not hide, does not rush — it simply arrives when it is time.

images.title: Skeleton Hand Holding Red Moon Dark Art Wallpaper
images.description: A white skeleton hand delicately holds a glowing red crescent moon with a skull in it, surrounded by bare branch lines on a pure black background. Represents owning the darkness — not fearing it, but cradling it like something precious.

standalones.title: Haunted History
standalones.description: Mysterious figure in a hat and sunglasses surrounded by ghosts with the caption don't check my history it's haunted.

standalones.title: Gangster Skull
standalones.description: Cartoon skeleton in a suit lounging with a cigar, gold chain, and awesome attitude.
